puzzle.title: The Voice That Called to Righteousness
puzzle.intro: In the ancient land of Midian, where trade flourished and caravans traveled through vast deserts, a prophet of Allah rose among the people who had strayed from the path of justice. This servant of Allah was sent with a divine mission that would test the faith of an entire community. Through trials of patience and perseverance, this soul stood firm in delivering a warning that would echo through history. Can you unravel the mystery of this steadfast messenger?
clues: I was chosen by Allah to guide a people who had forgotten the principles of fairness and honesty in their dealings.
I delivered a message calling my community to worship none but Allah and to speak with truth in all matters.
I specifically warned against the corrupt practice of consuming wealth through unlawful means and emphasized the importance of just weights and measures.
My people responded to my warnings with mockery, threatening to expel me from their land if I continued my message.
I remained resolute in my mission despite their hostility, declaring that my reward is with Allah alone.
My people were seized by a devastating punishment while I was saved by the mercy of my Lord, as my mission was fulfilled.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: Prophet Shu'aib
Prophet Hud
Prophet Salih
Prophet Lut
Prophet Muhammad ﷺ

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Facing a people who rejected truth and threatened punishment for delivering Allah's message
Witnessing the Great Flood that destroyed the disbelievers of a nation
Receiving revelation while traveling through the valley of笃
The trial of faith when an oppressive ruler attempted to silence the call to monotheism
A nation商asking for rain during a severe drought after years of disobedience
trial.answer: Facing a people who rejected truth and threatened punishment for delivering Allah's message

location.label: Key Element
options: The land of Midian, where my people conducted their trade and commerce
The deck of a great ship that saved the believers from a catastrophic flood
A cave in a rocky mountain where seven youths sought refuge from persecution
The sacred city of Jerusalem where I was taken for a nightly journey
A palace in Sheba where a great kingdom prepared to witness a divine sign
location.answer: The land of Midian, where my people conducted their trade and commerce

outcome.label: Outcome
options: My people were seized by a terrible punishment while I was saved, for I had fulfilled my duty to Allah
The disbelievers were turned into apes as they violated the sacred boundaries of Allah
My enemies embraced faith after witnessing a miraculous transformation
The land was blessed with abundant rain and prosperity after the people repented
I was martyred by my own people for refusing to abandon my mission
outcome.answer: My people were seized by a terrible punishment while I was saved, for I had fulfilled my duty to Allah

puzzle.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ شُعَيْبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
puzzle.verse: When Shuʿayb said to them, "Will you not fear Allāh? (26:177)
